provider_address: 88 King Street West, Suite 1400, Toronto, ON M5H 1A1, Canada
services_description: Northwind Digital Solutions will design, develop, and deploy a cloud-based data integration platform connecting Clearwater's existing portfolio management system with third-party market data feeds. Services include requirements analysis, system architecture, iterative development sprints, QA testing, deployment to production, and 90 days of post-launch support.
deliverables:
1. Technical requirements document
2. System architecture and API specification
3. Integration platform (production-ready)
4. Automated test suite with 90%+ code coverage
5. Operations runbook and knowledge transfer sessions
6. 90-day post-launch support with 4-hour SLA
renewal_terms: Automatically renews for successive 6-month periods unless either party provides 60 days written notice of non-renewal.
payment_schedule: Monthly installments of $29,000.00, due on the first business day of each month, beginning May 1, 2026.
late_penalty: 1.5% per month on overdue balances after a 10-day grace period.
invoicing_terms: Provider will submit invoices electronically by the 25th of each preceding month. Client will remit payment via wire transfer.
confidentiality_clause: Both parties agree to hold in strict confidence all proprietary information, trade secrets, technical data, and business strategies disclosed during the engagement. Confidentiality obligations survive for 3 years following termination of this agreement. Standard exclusions apply for information that becomes publicly available, was independently developed, or is required to be disclosed by law.
termination_convenience: Either party may terminate with 60 days written notice. Provider will be compensated for all work completed through the termination date.
termination_cause: Immediate termination upon material breach if the breaching party fails to cure within 30 days of written notice.
termination_effect: Upon termination, Provider will deliver all completed work product, transition documentation, and return or destroy Client's confidential materials within 15 business days.
liability_clause: Neither party's aggregate liability under this agreement shall exceed the total fees paid or payable in the 12-month period preceding the claim. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
governing_law: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Idaho, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Disputes shall be resolved through binding arbitration in Boise, ID under JAMS Commercial Arbitration Rules.
